name: Bystial Saronir
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>深淵の獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビーステッド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サロニール
desc: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. This is a Quick Effect if your opponent controls a monster. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Bystial" monster or 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY, except "Bystial Saronir". You can only use each effect of "Bystial Saronir" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. This is a Quick Effect if your opponent controls a monster. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Bystial" monster or 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY, except "Bystial Saronir". You can only use each effect of "Bystial Saronir" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. This is a Quick Effect if your opponent controls a monster. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Bystial" monster or 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY, except "Bystial Saronir". You can only use each effect of "Bystial Saronir" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack
THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
